name: Riverside Arashiyama — Pet-Friendly Arashiyama Apartments with No Dog Size Limit, Deep Soaking Baths, and Bamboo Grove Walks
short_description: A 23-unit apartment hotel 3 minutes walk from Hankyu Arashiyama Station with exceptional pet policies — no size limit for dogs, up to 2 dogs at no extra charge, cats also welcome. All units have deep soaking bathtubs, complimentary breakfast, and elevator access.
key_highlights: Dogs welcome — NO size limit, up to 2 dogs at no extra charge, 3rd dog+ charged | Cats welcome — no size limit, 1st cat included | Pet food/water bowls and off-leash area available | Deep soaking bathtub in every unit | 3-min walk from Hankyu Arashiyama Station | 10-min walk to Tenryu-ji Temple and Bamboo Grove | Complimentary light breakfast (bread, pastries, juice, coffee) | Elevator on-site
best_for: Dog-owning travelers visiting Arashiyama who want the most permissive pet policy in the DB — no size limit, multiple dogs welcome, cats too. Walking distance from Kyoto's most iconic natural scenery with deep soaking baths waiting after a day of sightseeing.
condition_details: Pet policy: Dogs are welcome with NO size restriction. Up to 2 dogs may stay with no additional pet fee — a fee applies from the 3rd dog onwards. Cats are also welcome with no size restriction — the 1st cat is included, fee applies from the 2nd cat onwards. After booking, you must submit your pet's information and vaccination certificate via the 'Pet Accompaniment Contact Form' on the official website before your stay. Pets must wear diapers inside the facility and guest rooms — bring pet diapers or confirm if they are provided. Pet-friendly rooms are specific designated room types — NOT all rooms allow pets. When booking, select or request a pet-friendly room; Standard Room, Theater Room, and Cyclist Room do not permit pets. On-site: food and water bowls and an off-leash area are available for pet guests.
access_summary: 3-minute walk from Hankyu Arashiyama Station (direct trains to Osaka Umeda, Kyoto Kawaramachi). 8-minute walk from Togetsukyo Bridge. 10-minute walk from Tenryu-ji Temple and Arashiyama Bamboo Grove. 10-minute walk from Arashiyama Monkey Park Iwatayama. Near bus connections to central Kyoto. Elevator in building.
luggage_summary: Luggage storage available at the front desk. Front desk open 6:00 AM-10:00 PM — no after-hours check-in. Staff has assisted guests with luggage shipping to airports. Bicycle parking also available.
kitchen_summary: Every unit has a kitchenette with microwave, refrigerator, and kitchenware. Note: no stovetop confirmed — cooking is microwave-based. Some guest reviews report inconsistency in cutlery and plate availability by room type — see caution notes. Complimentary light breakfast (bread/pastries, coffee, juice) served daily.
bath_summary: All 23 units have private deep soaking bathtubs with shower, bidet, separate toilet, hairdryer, and complimentary toiletries. All bathing is fully private per unit. No shared or communal bathing.
english_support_summary: Front desk open 6:00 AM-10:00 PM with English-capable staff (guest reviews confirm enough English to communicate). Free WiFi in all units. Booking available in English on Expedia, Booking.com, Hotels.com, and Klook.
rules_summary: Pets must wear diapers inside facility and guest rooms. Pet-friendly rooms only — must book designated room type. Pet information and vaccination certificate must be submitted via form before arrival. Quiet hours 21:00-09:00. Non-smoking throughout (outdoor smoking area available). No bachelor/bachelorette parties. Check-in 16:00-22:00, check-out 10:00. Front desk hours: 6:00 AM-10:00 PM.
verified_notes: Pet policy (no size limit for dogs, up to 2 dogs no extra charge, cats allowed) confirmed via Rakuten Travel property plan descriptions. Pet amenities (food/water bowls, off-leash area) confirmed Expedia. Deep soaking bathtubs in all units confirmed Hotels.com and Expedia. Microwave, fridge, and kitchenware confirmed multiple sources. Elevator confirmed. 3-minute walk from Hankyu Arashiyama Station confirmed Rakuten. Complimentary breakfast (bread, coffee, juice) confirmed multiple guest reviews. Luggage storage confirmed Booking.com. Front desk hours 6:00 AM-10:00 PM confirmed Klook. Quiet hours 21:00-09:00 confirmed Booking.com.
caution_notes: Pet-friendly rooms are specific designated types — NOT all 23 units permit pets. When booking, explicitly request a pet-friendly room. Standard Room, Theater Room, and Cyclist Room do NOT allow pets. After booking, submit pet information and vaccination certificate via the 'Pet Accompaniment Contact Form' on the official website before arrival. Pet diapers are required inside the building — bring your own or confirm with the property if they are provided. For the 3rd dog or 2nd cat and beyond, an additional fee applies — confirm current rates with the property. The kitchenette has a microwave and refrigerator but no stovetop — full cooking is not possible. Some guests report inconsistency in available cutlery and dishes by room type — confirm kitchenware availability with the property if you plan to use the kitchen extensively. Front desk closes at 10:00 PM — guests arriving after 10:00 PM cannot check in. No after-hours emergency contact method confirmed.

name: The Peninsula Tokyo — Luxury Dog Stay Program with Canine Cuisine, Peninsula Page Dog Walking, and Suite-Level Pampering
short_description: One of Tokyo's most luxurious dog-friendly hotels — The Peninsula Tokyo's Dog Stay Program offers a canine cuisine room service menu, complimentary dog walking in Hibiya Park by uniformed Peninsula Pages, and a full suite of pet amenities. Available with Suite bookings only (¥15,000/night dog fee, dogs under 15kg).
key_highlights: Canine cuisine room service menu (7 dishes including seasonal sashimi tartar and Kobe burger) | Complimentary dog walking by Peninsula Pages in Hibiya Park and Imperial Palace surroundings | Peninsula Page dog uniform rental for your dog | P.L.A.Y. dog bed, bowls, welcome basket, and dog diapers provided | Available in Suite room categories only — ¥15,000/night dog fee | Directly connected to Hibiya Station | Halal, vegetarian, and vegan dining options available
best_for: Dog-owning travelers seeking the most luxurious dog-stay experience in Tokyo — The Peninsula's Dog Stay Program is for Suite bookings only, making it the premier luxury option for guests who want their dog fully pampered while staying in one of Tokyo's finest hotels.
condition_details: Dog Stay Program (official peninsula.com): 1 dog per room, under 15kg, ¥15,000 per night additional fee. Suite bookings only — standard rooms do not qualify. Limited daily availability. Advance reservation required. Must provide dog name, breed, weight, birthday, and cage preference when booking. Amenities included: P.L.A.Y. dog bed with blanket and pillow, stainless steel water bowl, ceramic food bowl, Vittel water, welcome basket (wet tissues, dog diapers, toys, snacks). Optional: dog cage (¥3,000 additional). Canine cuisine room service menu with 7 options. Complimentary dog walking by Peninsula Pages in Hibiya Park or Imperial Palace surroundings (subject to availability, advance reservation required). Complimentary Peninsula Page dog uniform rental for your dog during the stay.
access_summary: Directly connected to Hibiya Station (Tokyo Metro Hibiya Line, Chiyoda Line, Toei Mita Line). 5-minute walk from JR Yurakucho Station and Ginza Station. Adjacent to Hibiya Park (dog walking destination). Walking distance to Ginza, Imperial Palace, and Marunouchi. 1 hour from Narita Airport via Narita Express.
luggage_summary: 24-hour concierge with luggage storage. Complimentary meet-and-greet and luggage assistance by Peninsula staff. Peninsula Tokyo has its own distinctive green uniformed Pages (also responsible for dog walking).
kitchen_summary: No kitchen in standard rooms. Some Premium Suites and The Peninsula Suite include a fully equipped kitchen and pantry — confirm at booking if kitchen access is important. 24-hour in-room dining available for both human guests and dogs (dedicated canine cuisine menu). Restaurants: Hei Fung Terrace (Cantonese), The Lobby, Peter (contemporary cuisine), The Bar. Halal, vegetarian, and vegan options available across the dining venues.
bath_summary: All rooms feature large private soaking bathtubs with separate showers — all bathing is fully private in-room. The Peninsula Spa has an indoor pool and full wellness facilities. No communal onsen or shared bathing. Tattoo policy for The Peninsula Spa pool is not explicitly stated on official sources — see caution notes.
english_support_summary: The Peninsula Hotels is a global luxury brand operating the highest-rated hotels worldwide. Forbes Five Star since 2007. All staff are English-speaking. Official website fully in English at peninsula.com/en/tokyo. 24-hour multilingual concierge service.
rules_summary: Dog Stay Program: Suites only. Dogs under 15kg, 1 per room, ¥15,000/night. Limited daily dog availability — advance reservation essential. Must provide dog details at booking. No cats mentioned. Children of all ages welcome. Non-smoking rooms.
verified_notes: Dog Stay Program confirmed on official peninsula.com/en/tokyo/dog-stay-program: Suite bookings only, ¥15,000/night, 1 dog under 15kg, P.L.A.Y. dog bed, food/water bowls, canine cuisine menu, Peninsula Page dog walking (advance reservation), dog uniform rental. Halal/vegetarian/vegan dining confirmed in input grounded summary. Luggage storage confirmed. Hibiya Station direct connection confirmed. The ¥15,000/night fee confirmed (the ¥45,000 figure is incorrect).
caution_notes: The Dog Stay Program is strictly for Suite room categories only — standard rooms cannot accommodate dogs. Limited dogs accepted per day, so book well in advance and specify all dog details (name, breed, weight, birthday) at reservation. The ¥15,000/night dog fee is in addition to the Suite room rate, which starts at approximately ¥200,000+ per night. Dog walking in Hibiya Park and dog cage are subject to availability and advance reservation. The tattoo policy for The Peninsula Spa indoor pool is not explicitly stated on the official website — guests with tattoos who wish to use the pool should contact the hotel before arrival. All in-room bathing (private soaking tub) is unaffected by any spa policy. This property is in Tokyo (Yurakucho), not the Kansai region.

name: W Osaka — Luxury Pet-Friendly Hotel in Shinsaibashi, up to 2 Dogs at 18kg via W Hotels PAW Program
short_description: A design-forward luxury Marriott W Hotel in Osaka's Shinsaibashi district, welcoming up to 2 dogs per room at up to 18kg each through the official W Hotels PAW (Pets Are Welcome) program. Neon-lit indoor pool, AWAY Spa, and walking distance to Dotonbori.
key_highlights: Up to 2 dogs per room, max 18kg each — the most generous pet policy among luxury Osaka hotels | W Hotels PAW (Pets Are Welcome) program — non-refundable fee ~¥14,300/stay + ¥2,300/night | Pet-friendly rooms on dedicated floors 6-8 | Neon-lit WET indoor pool + open-air WET Deck terrace | AWAY Spa and Technogym FIT gym with yoga room | Shinsaibashi location — 5-10 min walk to Dotonbori and Namba | Accessible rooms available
best_for: Luxury travelers with dogs (up to 18kg, up to 2 per room) visiting Osaka who want a design-forward W Hotels experience in the heart of Shinsaibashi, walking distance to Dotonbori and all of Osaka's Minami district.
condition_details: Pet policy (W Hotels PAW — Pets Are Welcome): Up to 2 dogs per room, maximum 18kg each. Non-refundable pet fee: approximately ¥14,300-15,730 per stay + ¥2,300-2,530 per night (confirm exact amount at booking as slight variation noted on official page). Pet-friendly rooms are on floors 6-8, subject to availability. Advance reservation noting pets required. W Hotels Osaka is part of the Marriott Bonvoy PAW program — dogs only (cats not confirmed). No communal onsen or public bath — all bathing is private in-room. Pool (WET) is for guests aged 16 and above.
access_summary: Chuo-ku Minami Semba 4-1-3, Osaka. 5-10 minute walk from Shinsaibashi Station (Osaka Metro Midosuji Line) and Nagahoribashi Station. Walking distance to Dotonbori, Amerika-mura, and Namba. Parking: hourly ¥1,500; valet ¥5,000/day. EV charging available. 35-45 minutes from Kansai International Airport by train.
luggage_summary: 24-hour front desk with luggage storage and concierge services. Valet parking available.
kitchen_summary: No kitchen in standard rooms. Some Suite room types may include kitchen facilities — confirm at booking if kitchen access is needed. Minibar in all rooms. Multiple dining options in the hotel. Vegetarian breakfast options available.
bath_summary: All rooms have private en-suite bathrooms. WET indoor pool (neon-lit, guests aged 16+ only) and open-air WET Deck terrace. AWAY Spa with full treatment menu. No communal onsen or shared bathing facilities — no tattoo policy concerns.
english_support_summary: Marriott W Hotels — international luxury brand with full English support. Official Marriott Bonvoy website and app for reservations in English. Accessible rooms available (disability assistance: +81 6-6484-5355). W Hotels PAW program is a globally recognized pet-friendly initiative.
rules_summary: Dogs only (up to 2 per room, max 18kg each). Non-refundable pet fee applies. Pet rooms on floors 6-8 subject to availability — book in advance noting pets. WET pool for guests 16+. Accessible rooms available on request. Parking: hourly ¥1,500 or valet ¥5,000/day. Check-in 3:00 PM, check-out 12:00 PM.
verified_notes: Pet policy (2 dogs/room, 18kg max, floors 6-8, non-refundable fee ~¥14,300/stay + ¥2,300/night) confirmed on official Marriott property page. PAW program page confirmed on Marriott offers. Indoor pool (WET, 16+) confirmed. AWAY Spa and Technogym FIT gym confirmed. Accessible rooms and disability hotline confirmed. Parking and EV charging confirmed. Vegetarian breakfast confirmed in input summary.
caution_notes: Pet-friendly rooms are on floors 6-8 and are subject to availability — contact the hotel or specify pets when booking to confirm a pet-designated room. The pet fee has two slightly different figures on the official page (approx. ¥14,300-15,730/stay + ¥2,300-2,530/night) — confirm the exact current rate at the time of booking. Cats are not confirmed as accepted — dogs only. WET indoor pool is for guests aged 16 and above. Some suites may include kitchen facilities — confirm at booking if this is needed.
